actionLibraryList.title: Mat Scapula Isolation
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with a neutral spine and pelvis. Place your feet hip-width apart on the mat. Extend your arms straight toward the ceiling with palms facing inward. Keep the shoulder blades neutral.
2.Inhale, protract the shoulder blades, creating a stretch between them.
3.Exhale, return the shoulder blades to neutral, extending and stretching the posterior shoulder girdle.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688675769.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower back stable, pressing the sacrum into the mat.\n2.Keep the lower limbs firmly planted and still."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to return the shoulder blades to neutral.
Inhale to protract and stretch between the shoulder blades.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid over-retracting the shoulder blades during the movement.
2.Keep the spine stable; avoid any spinal movement.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Arm Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with a neutral spine and pelvis. Place your feet hip-width apart on the mat. Extend your arms along your sides with palms facing down.
2.Inhale, lift both arms overhead in a controlled arc. Limit the range so that the abdominals remain engaged, the shoulder blades stay stable, and the lower ribs stay in contact with the mat.
3.Exhale, sweep the arms in an arc back down along the sides to the hips. Repeat the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688692658.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower back stable, pressing the sacrum into the mat.\n2.Keep the shoulders and neck relaxed, with the shoulders down."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale to lift and extend the arms overhead.
Exhale to sweep the arms back down in a controlled arc.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid flaring the ribs or arching the lower back; maintain core control.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and shoulder blades stable; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Open Book
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your side in a neutral spine position. Relax the chest, align the pelvis and legs in a straight line with heels together. Extend the top arm forward at chest height. Engage the core.
2.Inhale, rotate the thoracic spine backward while opening the top arm horizontally toward the floor, keeping the pelvis and lower body stable.
3.Exhale, rotate the thoracic spine back to the starting position, bringing the arm back to the initial placement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689393075.jpg","context":"1.Let the shoulders relax and sink naturally.\n2.Keep the pelvis vertical to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale to rotate the thoracic spine and open the arm.
Exhale to return to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid tilting or rocking forward/backward.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed; avoid shrugging.
3.Maintain control of the arm; avoid swinging or using momentum.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Cat & Cow
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Begin in a quadruped position with hands under the shoulders and knees under the hips. Keep the spine neutral, pelvis stable, and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, draw the abdomen inward and upward, tilt the pelvis posteriorly, and sequentially roll the spine from the tailbone, rounding the back to the highest point into Cat Pose.
3.Inhale, return the torso to a neutral position, then sequentially extend the spine from the tailbone to the crown of the head, opening the chest forward into Cow Pose.
4.Exhale, return to neutral and roll again. Flow smoothly between flexion and extension with the breath, maintaining stable shoulder blades and core engagement throughout.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770690119784.jpg","context":"1.Keep the spine and pelvis stable; avoid collapsing the lower back.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck, letting them drop down naturally."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale, engage the abdominals, and flex the spine segment by segment.
Inhale, lengthen and open the spine.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid collapsing the lower back or over-compressing the lumbar spine, maintaining neutral control.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and avoid compensating with the arms.
3.Avoid moving only the head or pelvis; ensure the spine moves segment by segment.

actionLibraryList.title: Lying Triceps Press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale as you pull the handles down toward your sides, bringing the palms toward the outer thighs.
2.Inhale, keeping the core engaged, and slowly return the arms to the starting position with control—avoid letting them drop quickly.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626692481.jpg","context":"1.Position the knees directly above the hips in a stable tabletop.\n2.Press the lower back into the mat and keep the pelvis stable.\n3.Relax the shoulders and draw them down away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the back, core, and arms.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the legs stable—avoid any wobbling.
2.Control the return—do not let them drop too quickly.
3.Keep the ribs neutral and shoulders down—avoid flaring or shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Lying Side Arm
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale and engage the back muscles as you smoothly lower the arms from the sides down toward the outer thighs.
2.As you pull down, draw the shoulder blades toward the spine and down—avoid shrugging or forcing with the shoulders.
3.Inhale and resist the tension as you slowly return the arms to the T-position, emphasizing control on the return.
4.Throughout, keep the legs in tabletop, and maintain a stable pelvis and spine.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626672042.jpg","context":"1.Position the knees directly above the hips in a stable tabletop.\n2.Press the lower back into the mat and keep the pelvis stable.\n3.Relax the shoulders and draw them down away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to pull the arms down.
Inhale to slowly return the arms.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the shoulders, back, and arms.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the ribs neutral—avoid flaring or collapsing the lower back.
2.Do not shrug the shoulders.
3.Keep the wrists straight—avoid bending them.
4.Keep the knees away from the chest.

actionLibraryList.title: Lying Arm Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Open the arms out to the sides, lower them close to the floor, then press down. From near the hips, control the arms inward and upward, drawing circles along the sides of the body, and finish with the arms returning to a position above the chest.
3.Keep the arms below shoulder level throughout the movement.
4.Maintain a stable tabletop position with the legs, keeping the pelvis and spine steady the entire time.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626713742.jpg","context":"1.Keep the knees stacked directly over the hips, maintaining a stable tabletop position.\n2.Gently press the lower back into the mat and keep the pelvis stable.\n3.Relax the shoulders and draw them down away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe steadily throughout.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the back, core, and arms.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the ribs from flaring and avoid arching the lower back.
2.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
3.Keep the wrists neutral—don’t flex them.
4.Don’t let the knees drift toward the chest.

actionLibraryList.title: The Hundred (Tabletop Legs)
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, curling the head, neck, and shoulder blades off the mat in sequence until the lower edge of the shoulder blades remain on the mat.
2.Hold the curl, keeping the core engaged, pelvis stable, and legs in tabletop without movement.
3.Perform small, controlled taps with the arms led by the shoulders.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1771058609378.jpg","context":"1.Press the lower back into the mat to prevent arching.\n2.Bend the hips and knees, lifting the legs so the shins are roughly parallel to the floor.\n3.Relax the shoulders, letting them drop away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Maintain a steady, even breath.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your lower back and spine in contact with the mat, and keep the legs still.
2.Relax the neck and avoid shrugging the shoulders.

actionLibraryList.title: The Hundred
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, curling the head, neck, and shoulder blades off the mat in sequence until the lower edge of the shoulder blades stays on the mat.
2.Hold the curl, keeping the core engaged and the pelvis stable.
3.Perform small, controlled taps with the arms, led by the shoulders.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626840809.jpg","context":"1.Press the lower back into the mat to prevent arching.\n2.Extend the legs and lift them to roughly a 45-degree angle.\n3.Relax the shoulders, letting them drop away from the ears."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe steadily.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your lower back stable, don’t arch or rock.
2.Keep neck and shoulders relaxed; no shrugging.
3.Move your arms with control; avoid flailing.

actionLibraryList.title: Kneeling Offering
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start with the shoulders opened back in a shoulder extension position, elbows bent close to 90 degrees, and palms facing up.
2.Exhale to press the hands forward, extending them to shoulder height.
3.Inhale to open the arms out to the sides at shoulder level.
4.Exhale to bring the arms forward.
5.Inhale to bend the elbows and return to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627873400.jpg","context":"1.Maintain a neutral spine and let the shoulders sink and relax.\n2.Keep the lower body stable, kneeling on the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to press forward.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Relax the shoulders and neck, maintaining a neutral spine.
2.Kneel with a stable lower body, keeping the torso steady.

actionLibraryList.title: Kneeling Hug Tree
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start with the shoulders opened back in a shoulder extension position, palms facing up, and elbows bent close to 90 degrees.
2.Exhale to press the hands forward, extending the arms to shoulder height and internally rotating the arms so the palms face each other.
3.Inhale to open the arms out to the sides at shoulder level, not going beyond shoulder height.
4.Exhale to bring the arms back together in front of the shoulders.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627889494.jpg","context":"1.Maintain a neutral spine and let the shoulders sink and relax.\n2.Keep the pelvis and lower body stable, kneeling firmly on the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Relax the shoulders and neck, maintaining a neutral spine.
2.Kneel stably on the mat, keeping the torso steady.

actionLibraryList.title: Kneeling Arm Shave
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Raise the arms in front of the shoulders, then open out to the sides, bending the elbows so the backs of the hands are in front of the forehead.
2.Exhale to engage the arms, keeping the upper arms stable, and press the handles upward and slightly forward until the arms are fully extended.
3.Pause briefly at full extension, feeling the squeeze and stability in the back of the upper arms.
4.Inhale to resist the band as it pulls back, bending the elbows in a controlled manner, and slowly return the handles to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627944243.jpg","context":"1.Maintain a neutral spine and let the shoulders sink and relax.\n2.Engage the core.\n3.Keep the lower body stable, kneeling firmly on the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable while kneeling on the mat, avoiding lumbar compensation or sagging.
2.Do not shrug the shoulders.
3.Avoid returning too quickly.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Kneeling Biceps Curl
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Raise your arms to a lateral position. Exhale and engage your biceps to bend your elbows, bringing your hands toward your ears.
2.Keep your torso facing forward throughout the movement.
3.Inhale and slowly return to the starting position, controlling the movement against the cable to avoid being pulled back.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770694881620.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine.\n3.Keep your pelvis stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid compensating with your lower back.
2.Keep your elbows at shoulder height and your upper arms stable.
3.Maintain your center of gravity without swaying.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Kneeling Arm Press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start with one arm bent at your side. Inhale to press the arm upward until fully extended.
2.Exhale and bend the arm to slowly lower it back to the starting position.
3.Keep your torso facing forward throughout the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770694148745.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine.\n3.Keep your pelvis stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your shoulders down; avoid shrugging.
2.Maintain your center of gravity without swaying.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Kneeling Single-Arm Hug Twist
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start with your arm extended at your side. Exhale and rotate your thoracic spine to pull the strap toward the opposite side.
2.Inhale, open your thoracic spine and arms, and return your torso to neutral.
3.Keep your torso neutral and thighs facing forward throughout the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770708428717.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine.\n3.Keep your pelvis stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your shoulders down; avoid shrugging.
2.Maintain a neutral torso and stable lower body without swaying.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Kneeling Biceps Curl
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Raise your arms to a lateral position. Exhale and engage your biceps to bend your elbows, bringing your hands toward your ears.
2.Keep your torso facing forward throughout the movement.
3.Inhale and slowly return to the starting position, controlling the movement against the cable to avoid being pulled back.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770694881620.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine.\n3.Keep your pelvis stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid compensating with your lower back.
2.Keep your elbows at shoulder height and your upper arms stable.
3.Maintain your center of gravity without swaying.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Kneeling Arm Press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start with one arm bent at your side. Inhale to press the arm upward until fully extended.
2.Exhale and bend the arm to slowly lower it back to the starting position.
3.Keep your torso facing forward throughout the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770694148745.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine.\n3.Keep your pelvis stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your shoulders down; avoid shrugging.
2.Maintain your center of gravity without swaying.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Kneeling Single-Arm Hug Twist
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start with your arm extended at your side. Exhale and rotate your thoracic spine to pull the strap toward the opposite side.
2.Inhale, open your thoracic spine and arms, and return your torso to neutral.
3.Keep your torso neutral and thighs facing forward throughout the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770708428717.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine.\n3.Keep your pelvis stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to slowly return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your shoulders down; avoid shrugging.
2.Maintain a neutral torso and stable lower body without swaying.

actionLibraryList.title: Reverse Crunch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie supine in tabletop position with hands behind the head, head lifted off the mat, shoulder blades slightly off the mat, and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, draw the abdominals inward and upward, slightly posteriorly tilt the pelvis, and bend the hips and knees. Bring the knees toward the chest slowly and in a controlled manner, keeping the torso height unchanged.
3.Inhale, maintain the back and head/neck position, and control the legs as they return to tabletop position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688408481.jpg","context":"1.Keep the head and neck in a neutral, stable position.\n2.Keep the shoulder blades and upper back pressed against the mat, without movement during the exercise."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale, engage the core, posteriorly tilt the pelvis, and bring the knees toward the chest.
Inhale, maintain torso height and control the legs as they return to start.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Do not swing the legs or use momentum to complete the movement.
2.Avoid straining the neck or jutting the chin forward.
3.Prevent excessive back movement; maintain control of the pelvis.

actionLibraryList.title: Reverse Crunch Twist 2
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie supine in tabletop position with hands behind the head, head lifted off the mat, shoulder blades slightly off the mat, and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Extend the left hand forward toward the outside of the right thigh. Exhale, reaching the hand outward while drawing the knees toward the body.
3.Inhale, rotate the torso back to center, keeping the back stable, and control the legs as they return to tabletop position.
4.Exhale, switch sides and repeat the movement alternately.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688447973.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulder blades stable on the mat.\n2.Draw the ribcage inward; avoid flaring."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to engage, curl, and lift the torso.
Inhale to return to neutral with control.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the core, hips, and arms.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Do not swing the legs or use momentum to complete the movement.
2.Avoid straining the neck or jutting the chin forward.
3.Prevent excessive pelvic movement; maintain control.

actionLibraryList.title: Shoulder Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, and let the shoulders relax down.
2.Inhale to prepare. Extend one arm straight across the chest, keeping the palm relaxed and the shoulder blade stable without shrugging. Use the opposite forearm or hand to gently press the arm closer to the chest, feeling a gentle stretch across the rear shoulder, posterior deltoid, and surrounding shoulder joint. Breathe evenly while holding the stretch.
3.Exhale slowly to release back to neutral, then repeat on the other side.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691152685.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and stable pelvis."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly while holding the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch around the shoulder joint.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.
2.Draw the ribs in, avoid flaring, and keep the torso aligned without twisting.

actionLibraryList.title: Triceps Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit with a long spine, lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, relax the shoulders, and release the neck.
2.Inhale to prepare. Raise one arm, bending the elbow to bring the hand toward the upper back. Use the other hand to gently support the raised elbow, applying a slight inward and backward pressure to lengthen the triceps. Maintain even breathing and feel a gentle stretch along the back of the upper arm.
3.Exhale and slowly release back to the starting position. Repeat on the other side.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691135077.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine with a stable pelvis."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel the stretch along the back of the upper arm (triceps).
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
2.Keep the ribs drawn in, maintaining a stable lower back without excessive arching.

actionLibraryList.title: Biceps Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit tall on the mat with legs extended, lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, lengthen the spine, and let the shoulders relax down.
2.Inhale and place both hands behind you, elbows straight. Exhale as you gently push into the mat to open the chest, drawing the shoulder blades down and back. Feel a gentle stretch along the front of the upper arms and biceps. Breathe evenly while holding the stretch.
3.Exhale with control to relax back to neutral.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691186770.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and stable pelvis."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly while in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch through the abdominals and core.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and the neck soft, avoiding excessive backward tilt.
2.Prevent the ribs from flaring outward.
